Routine.Name: rtAnalogInput
Routine.Description: Turns analog INT into real engineering value

Rung.Comment:
All below rungs call the update routines getting the engineering values of the raw analog values based on the calibrated min/max values
All below rungs interact with the analog inputs screen for calibration of min/max values
JEO - Updated to look at the load cell high recipe paremeter instead of the target force since we don't move to force anymore. We move to position and stop if force is exceeded. - 08/05/14
